role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of the fund’s assets in, or provide exposure equal to, financial instruments that the Adviser and Sub-Adviser believe, in combination, should produce daily returns consistent with the fund’s investment objective of seeking daily investment results, before fees and expenses, that correspond to two times (2x) the daily price performance of DOGE. The fund is non-diversified.
